The message is the same: to promote peace."

The post The battle over the word Zionism appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: IDF says it raided hospital used by Hezbollah in terror group’s Bint Jbeil stronghold
description:
'Fierce clashes' reported as army advances in southern Lebanese town; military says troops killed Hezbollah gunman responsible for killing soldier last week
The post IDF says it raided hospital used by Hezbollah in terror groups Bint Jbeil stronghold appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Live: Polls close in crucial Hungary election, turnout reaches record high
description: Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban faces his biggest challenge on Sunday as the country votes in crucial elections that could hand victory to his centre-right rival Peter Magyar. Orban, an ally of US President Donald Trump and one of the European Union's biggest antagonists, has run an aggressive campaign, claiming that a defeat would drag his country into war alongside Ukraine. Follow our liveblog for all the latest developments.

title: Iranian authorities remain defiant, urge supporters to stay in streets
description: Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf, who led Irans delegation in talks to end the war, said US delegation failed to gain trust.

title: Боксер Субханкулов усомнился, что Махмудов получит большие бои после поражения от Фьюри
description: Обладатель пояса IBF Asia в легком весе Артур Субханкулов посетовал, что россиянин Арсланбек Махмудов не смог составить должной конкуренции в проигранном поединке британцу Тайсону Фьюри."К сожалению, Махмудов не смог показать конкурентный поединок, составить конкуренцию Фьюри.
